---
title: "PREVENT-AD Demographic Summary"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
library(stringr)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

predictors    <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH, "PREVENTAD_predictors.rds"))
biomarkers    <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH, "PREVENTAD_longitudinal.rds"))
PREVENTAD_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_raw.rds"))
baseline_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH, "PREVENTAD_baseline.rds"))
mci_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_MCI.rds"))
```

```{r load-pet-amyloid}
# Replicate inclusion criteria from PREVENT-AD_PET.qmd:
#   exclude participants missing CRS/GWAS data, then apply primary CL >= 22.32 threshold
# exclude_ids_pet <- readRDS(here("data", "intermediate", "PREVENTAD_missingcrs.rds"))

pet_amyloid_status <- read_csv(
  file.path(PREVENTAD_DATA_PATH,
            "PET_NAV_SUVR_ref-wholeCerebellum_Registered_PREVENTAD_2025-03-21.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  filter(PET_tracer == "NAV") %>%
  # filter(!CONP_ID %in% exclude_ids_pet$CONP_ID) %>%
  select(CONP_ID, centiloid = WhlCbl_centiloid) %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  summarise(amyloid_pet_pos = as.integer(any(centiloid >= 22.32)), .groups = "drop")
```

# Table 1: Baseline participant characteristics stratified by MCI status

```{r table-1}
mci_ids <- mci_dat %>% distinct(CONP_ID) %>% pull(CONP_ID)

table1_data <- baseline_dat %>%
  left_join(
    PREVENTAD_dat$demographics %>%
      select(CONP_ID, Ethnicity) %>%
      mutate(Ethnicity = str_to_sentence(Ethnicity)),
    by = "CONP_ID"
  ) %>%
  left_join(pet_amyloid_status, by = "CONP_ID") %>%
  mutate(
    female    = if_else(sex == "Female", 1, 0),
    caucasian = if_else(Ethnicity == "Caucasian", 1, 0),
    mci_status = factor(
      case_when(
        CONP_ID %in% mci_ids      ~ "Progressed to MCI",
        TRUE                       ~ "Remained CU"
      ),
      levels = c("Remained CU", "Progressed to MCI")
    ),
    risk_score_cogd_f   = factor(risk_score_cogd,   levels = 0:4),
    risk_score_libra2_f = factor(risk_score_libra2, levels = 0:3)
  ) %>%
  select(
    # Demographics
    age, female, educ, caucasian, amyloid_pet_pos,
    # AD risk factors
    apoe, FDR_AD, GRS, score_cogd, score_libra2,
    # Risk indicators (binarized)
    apoe_burden, grs_burden, fhx_burden, cogdrisk_burden, libra2_burden,
    # Risk indicator burden composites
    risk_score_cogd_f, risk_score_libra2_f,
    # Baseline biomarkers
    ab_ratio, gfap, nfl, ptau181, ptau217, ptau217_ab42_ratio,
    # Grouping variable
    mci_status
  )

table1_gtsummary <- table1_data %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = mci_status,
    type = list(
      female          ~ "dichotomous",
      caucasian       ~ "dichotomous",
      amyloid_pet_pos ~ "dichotomous",
      apoe_burden ~ "dichotomous",
      fhx_burden ~ "dichotomous",
      cogdrisk_burden ~ "dichotomous", 
      libra2_burden ~ "dichotomous", 
      grs_burden ~ "dichotomous"
    ),
    label = list(
      age                = "Age (years)",
      female             = "Female",
      educ               = "Years of education",
      caucasian          = "Caucasian",
      amyloid_pet_pos    = "Amyloid PET positive",
      apoe               = "APOE genotype",
      FDR_AD             = "FDRs with AD",
      GRS                = "Polygenic risk score",
      score_cogd         = "CogDrisk score",
      score_libra2       = "LIBRA2 score",
      apoe_burden        = "APOE e4+",
      fhx_burden         = "Family history of AD",
      cogdrisk_burden    = "CogDrisk ≥8",
      libra2_burden      = "LIBRA2 ≥7.3",
      grs_burden         = "PRS ≥75%",
      risk_score_cogd_f   = "CogDrisk",
      risk_score_libra2_f = "LIBRA2",
      ab_ratio           = "A\u03b242/A\u03b240 ratio",
      gfap               = "GFAP (pg/mL)",
      nfl                = "NfL (pg/mL)",
      ptau181            = "p-tau181 (pg/mL)",
      ptau217            = "p-tau217 (pg/mL)",
      ptau217_ab42_ratio = "p-tau217/A\u03b242 ratio"
    ),
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous()  ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
    ),
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  add_overall(last = FALSE) %>%
  add_p(
    test = list(
      all_continuous()  ~ "kruskal.test",
      all_categorical() ~ "chisq.test"
    )
  ) %>%
  modify_header(label ~ "**Characteristic**") %>%
  modify_table_body(
    ~.x %>%
      mutate(
        grouping = case_when(
          variable %in% c("age", "female", "educ", "caucasian", "amyloid_pet_pos") ~ "Demographics",
          variable %in% c("apoe", "FDR_AD", "GRS", "score_cogd", "score_libra2")  ~ "AD risk factors",
          variable %in% c("apoe_burden", "fhx_burden", "cogdrisk_burden", "libra2_burden",
                          "grs_burden")                                           ~ "AD risk indicators",
          variable %in% c("risk_score_cogd_f", "risk_score_libra2_f")            ~ "Risk indicator burden",
          variable %in% c("ab_ratio", "gfap", "nfl", "ptau181",
                          "ptau217", "ptau217_ab42_ratio")                        ~ "Baseline biomarkers",
          TRUE ~ NA_character_
        )
      )
  ) %>%
  modify_footnote(all_stat_cols() ~ "Mean (SD) for continuous; n (%) for categorical") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  italicize_levels()

table1_gt <- table1_gtsummary %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title    = md("**Table 1.** Baseline Characteristics of PREVENT-AD Sample"),
    subtitle = md("Stratified by Cognitive Progression Status")
  ) %>%
  tab_row_group(
    label = md("**Baseline biomarkers**"),
    rows  = grouping == "Baseline biomarkers"
  ) %>%
  tab_row_group(
    label = md("**Risk indicator burden**"),
    rows  = grouping == "Risk indicator burden"
  ) %>%
  tab_row_group(
    label = md("**AD risk indicators**"),
    rows  = grouping == "AD risk indicators"
  ) %>%
  tab_row_group(
    label = md("**AD risk factors**"),
    rows  = grouping == "AD risk factors"
  ) %>%
  tab_row_group(
    label = md("**Demographics**"),
    rows  = grouping == "Demographics"
  ) %>%
  row_group_order(groups = c("**Demographics**", "**AD risk factors**",
                            "**AD risk indicators**", "**Risk indicator burden**",
                            "**Baseline biomarkers**")) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = list(cell_text(weight = "bold"),
                     cell_fill(color = "#f8f9fa")),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) %>%
  cols_hide(columns = any_of(c("variable", "grouping", "row_type")))

table1_gt

gtsave(table1_gt, filename = file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "table1_baseline_characteristics.docx"))
```

## Table 1a for defense slides

```{r table-1a}
table1a_data <- baseline_dat %>%
  left_join(
    PREVENTAD_dat$demographics %>%
      select(CONP_ID, Ethnicity) %>%
      mutate(Ethnicity = str_to_sentence(Ethnicity)),
    by = "CONP_ID"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    female    = if_else(sex == "Female", 1, 0),
    caucasian = if_else(Ethnicity == "Caucasian", 1, 0),
    mci_prog_status = factor(
      if_else(CONP_ID %in% mci_ids, "Progressed to MCI", "Remained CU"),
      levels = c("Remained CU", "Progressed to MCI")
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    # Demographics
    age, female, educ, caucasian,
    # AD risk indicators (binarized)
    apoe_burden, fhx_burden, grs_burden, cogdrisk_burden, libra2_burden,
    # Baseline biomarkers
    ab_ratio, gfap, nfl, ptau181, ptau217, ptau217_ab42_ratio,
    # Grouping variable
    mci_prog_status
  )

table1a_gtsummary <- table1a_data %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = mci_prog_status,
    type = list(
      female          ~ "dichotomous",
      caucasian       ~ "dichotomous",
      apoe_burden     ~ "dichotomous",
      fhx_burden      ~ "dichotomous",
      grs_burden      ~ "dichotomous",
      cogdrisk_burden ~ "dichotomous",
      libra2_burden   ~ "dichotomous"
    ),
    label = list(
      age                = "Age (years)",
      female             = "Female",
      educ               = "Years of education",
      caucasian          = "Caucasian",
      apoe_burden        = "APOE e4+",
      fhx_burden         = "Family history of AD",
      grs_burden         = "PRS ≥75%",
      cogdrisk_burden    = "CogDrisk ≥8",
      libra2_burden      = "LIBRA2 ≥7.3",
      ab_ratio           = "Aβ42/Aβ40 ratio",
      gfap               = "GFAP (pg/mL)",
      nfl                = "NfL (pg/mL)",
      ptau181            = "p-tau181 (pg/mL)",
      ptau217            = "p-tau217 (pg/mL)",
      ptau217_ab42_ratio = "p-tau217/Aβ42 ratio"
    ),
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous()  ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
    ),
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  add_overall(last = FALSE) %>%
  add_p(
    test = list(
      all_continuous()  ~ "wilcox.test",
      all_categorical() ~ "chisq.test"
    )
  ) %>%
  modify_header(label ~ "**Characteristic**") %>%
  modify_table_body(
    ~.x %>%
      mutate(
        grouping = case_when(
          variable %in% c("age", "female", "educ", "caucasian") ~ "Demographics",
          variable %in% c("apoe_burden", "fhx_burden", "grs_burden",
                          "cogdrisk_burden", "libra2_burden") ~ "AD risk indicators",
          variable %in% c("ab_ratio", "gfap", "nfl", "ptau181",
                          "ptau217", "ptau217_ab42_ratio") ~ "Baseline biomarkers",
          TRUE ~ NA_character_
        )
      )
  ) %>%
  modify_footnote(all_stat_cols() ~ "Mean (SD) for continuous; n (%) for categorical") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  italicize_levels()

table1a_gt <- table1a_gtsummary %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title    = md("**Baseline Characteristics of PREVENT-AD Sample**"),
    subtitle = md("PREVENT-AD participants stratified by MCI progression status")
  ) %>%
  tab_row_group(
    label = md("**Baseline biomarkers**"),
    rows  = grouping == "Baseline biomarkers"
  ) %>%
  tab_row_group(
    label = md("**AD risk indicators**"),
    rows  = grouping == "AD risk indicators"
  ) %>%
  tab_row_group(
    label = md("**Demographics**"),
    rows  = grouping == "Demographics"
  ) %>%
  row_group_order(groups = c(
    "**Demographics**", "**AD risk indicators**", "**Baseline biomarkers**"
  )) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = list(cell_text(weight = "bold"),
                     cell_fill(color = "#f8f9fa")),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) %>%
  cols_hide(columns = any_of(c("variable", "grouping", "row_type")))

table1a_gt

gtsave(table1a_gt, filename = file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "table1a_mci_characteristics.png"))
```

# Table 2: Cross-Sectional Associations between Composite Risk Burden and Plasma Biomarkers

```{r table-2}
outcome_order <- c("ab_ratio", "gfap_log", "nfl_log",
                   "ptau181_log", "ptau217_log", "ptau217_ab42_ratio_log")

term_order <- c("Clinical Risk Score", "APOE \u03b54 Carrier",
                "Genetic Risk Score", "Family History (\u22652 FDR)")

table2_long <- read_csv(
  here("results/Aim1/tables/crosssectional_results.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  filter(model %in% c("CogDrisk_cont", "LIBRA2_cont")) %>%
  mutate(
    biomarker = case_when(
      outcome == "ab_ratio"               ~ "A\u03b242/40 ratio",
      outcome == "gfap_log"               ~ "GFAP (log)",
      outcome == "nfl_log"                ~ "NfL (log)",
      outcome == "ptau181_log"            ~ "p-tau181 (log)",
      outcome == "ptau217_log"            ~ "p-tau217 (log)",
      outcome == "ptau217_ab42_ratio_log" ~ "p-tau217/A\u03b242 ratio (log)"
    ),
    term_label = case_when(
      term %in% c("score_cogd_z", "score_libra2_z") ~ "Clinical Risk Score",
      term == "apoe_burden"                          ~ "APOE \u03b54 Carrier",
      term == "GRS"                                  ~ "Genetic Risk Score",
      term == "fhx_burden"                           ~ "Family History (\u22652 FDR)"
    ),
    beta_se = sprintf("%.3f (%.3f)", estimate, std.error),
    ci      = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", conf.low, conf.high),
    p_fmt   = if_else(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p.value)),
    stars = case_when(
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE            ~ ""
    )
  )

# Pivot wide: one row per biomarker × term, columns split by model
table2_wide <- table2_long %>%
  select(composite_type, biomarker, outcome, term_label,
         beta_se, ci, p_fmt, stars) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = composite_type,
    values_from = c(beta_se, ci, p_fmt, stars),
    names_glue  = "{composite_type}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    biomarker  = factor(biomarker, levels = c(
      "A\u03b242/40 ratio", "GFAP (log)", "NfL (log)",
      "p-tau181 (log)", "p-tau217 (log)", "p-tau217/A\u03b242 ratio (log)"
    )),
    term_label = factor(term_label, levels = term_order)
  ) %>%
  arrange(biomarker, term_label) %>%
  select(biomarker, term_label,
         CogDrisk_beta_se, CogDrisk_ci, CogDrisk_p_fmt, CogDrisk_stars,
         LIBRA2_beta_se,   LIBRA2_ci,   LIBRA2_p_fmt,   LIBRA2_stars)

table2_gt <- table2_wide %>%
  gt(groupname_col = "biomarker") %>%
  tab_header(
    title    = md("**Table 2.** Cross-Sectional Associations between Composite Risk Burden and Plasma Biomarkers"),
    subtitle = md("Linear regression models; composite scores z-scored (\u03b2 per SD)")
  ) %>%
  # Column spanners
  tab_spanner(
    label   = md("**CogDrisk**"),
    columns = starts_with("CogDrisk_")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label   = md("**LIBRA2**"),
    columns = starts_with("LIBRA2_")
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    term_label        = md("**Predictor**"),
    CogDrisk_beta_se  = md("**\u03b2 (SE)**"),
    CogDrisk_ci       = md("**95% CI**"),
    CogDrisk_p_fmt    = md("**p**"),
    CogDrisk_stars    = md(""),
    LIBRA2_beta_se    = md("**\u03b2 (SE)**"),
    LIBRA2_ci         = md("**95% CI**"),
    LIBRA2_p_fmt      = md("**p**"),
    LIBRA2_stars      = md("")
  ) %>%
  # Highlight significant p-values
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#e8f4e8"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = CogDrisk_p_fmt,
      rows    = CogDrisk_stars %in% c("*", "**", "***")
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#e8f4e8"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = LIBRA2_p_fmt,
      rows    = LIBRA2_stars %in% c("*", "**", "***")
    )
  ) %>%
  # Bold row group headers
  tab_style(
    style     = list(cell_text(weight = "bold"),
                     cell_fill(color = "#f8f9fa")),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote(
    footnote  = md("*** p<0.001; ** p<0.01; * p<0.05. Clinical risk scores z-scored; \u03b2 reflects change per SD. Highlighted cells indicate p<0.05."),
    locations = cells_column_spanners()
  ) %>%
  cols_align(align = "left", columns = term_label) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(align = "right", indent = px(12)),
    locations = cells_body(columns = term_label)
  ) %>%
  cols_align(align = "center", columns = c(starts_with("CogDrisk_"), starts_with("LIBRA2_"))) %>%
  row_group_order(groups = c(
    "A\u03b242/40 ratio", "GFAP (log)", "NfL (log)",
    "p-tau181 (log)", "p-tau217 (log)", "p-tau217/A\u03b242 ratio (log)"
  ))

table2_gt

gtsave(table2_gt, filename = file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "s_table_xsect_assoc.docx"))
```

# Table 3: Longitudinal Associations between Composite Risk Burden and Plasma Biomarker Trajectories (Main Effect)

```{r table-3}
table3_long <- read_csv(
  here("results/Aim1/tables/longitudinal_doseresponse_results.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  filter(model_type == "Main Effect") %>%
  mutate(
    biomarker = case_when(
      outcome == "ab_ratio"               ~ "A\u03b242/40 ratio",
      outcome == "gfap_log"               ~ "GFAP (log)",
      outcome == "nfl_log"                ~ "NfL (log)",
      outcome == "ptau181_log"            ~ "p-tau181 (log)",
      outcome == "ptau217_log"            ~ "p-tau217 (log)",
      outcome == "ptau217_ab42_ratio_log" ~ "p-tau217/A\u03b242 ratio (log)"
    ),
    beta_se  = sprintf("%.3f (%.3f)", estimate, std.error),
    ci       = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", conf.low, conf.high),
    p_fmt    = if_else(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p.value)),
    stars    = case_when(
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE            ~ ""
    ),
    pct_change = if_else(
      !is.na(pct_change_per_unit),
      sprintf("%+.1f%%", pct_change_per_unit),
      "\u2014"
    )
  )

table3_wide <- table3_long %>%
  select(risk_type, biomarker, outcome, beta_se, ci, p_fmt, stars, pct_change) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = risk_type,
    values_from = c(beta_se, ci, p_fmt, stars, pct_change),
    names_glue  = "{risk_type}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    biomarker = factor(biomarker, levels = c(
      "A\u03b242/40 ratio", "GFAP (log)", "NfL (log)",
      "p-tau181 (log)", "p-tau217 (log)", "p-tau217/A\u03b242 ratio (log)"
    ))
  ) %>%
  arrange(biomarker) %>%
  select(biomarker,
         CogDrisk_beta_se, CogDrisk_ci, CogDrisk_p_fmt, CogDrisk_stars, CogDrisk_pct_change,
         LIBRA2_beta_se,   LIBRA2_ci,   LIBRA2_p_fmt,   LIBRA2_stars,   LIBRA2_pct_change)

table3_gt <- table3_wide %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title    = md("**Table 3.** Longitudinal Associations between Composite Risk Burden and Plasma Biomarker Trajectories"),
    subtitle = md("Linear mixed-effects models (main effect); \u03b2 reflects change per 1-unit increase in composite risk score")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label   = md("**CogDrisk**"),
    columns = starts_with("CogDrisk_")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label   = md("**LIBRA2**"),
    columns = starts_with("LIBRA2_")
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    biomarker              = md("**Biomarker**"),
    CogDrisk_beta_se       = md("**\u03b2 (SE)**"),
    CogDrisk_ci            = md("**95% CI**"),
    CogDrisk_p_fmt         = md("**p**"),
    CogDrisk_stars         = md(""),
    CogDrisk_pct_change    = md("**% change**"),
    LIBRA2_beta_se         = md("**\u03b2 (SE)**"),
    LIBRA2_ci              = md("**95% CI**"),
    LIBRA2_p_fmt           = md("**p**"),
    LIBRA2_stars           = md(""),
    LIBRA2_pct_change      = md("**% change**")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#e8f4e8"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = CogDrisk_p_fmt,
      rows    = CogDrisk_stars %in% c("*", "**", "***")
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#e8f4e8"),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = LIBRA2_p_fmt,
      rows    = LIBRA2_stars %in% c("*", "**", "***")
    )
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = list(cell_text(weight = "bold"),
                     cell_fill(color = "#f8f9fa")),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote(
    footnote  = md("*** p<0.001; ** p<0.01; * p<0.05. Models adjusted for time (years centered at baseline); random intercept per participant. % change = (exp(\u03b2) \u2212 1) \u00d7 100; applicable to log-transformed outcomes only (\u2014 for A\u03b242/40 ratio). Highlighted cells indicate p<0.05."),
    locations = cells_column_spanners()
  ) %>%
  cols_align(align = "left",   columns = biomarker) %>%
  cols_align(align = "center", columns = c(starts_with("CogDrisk_"), starts_with("LIBRA2_")))

table3_gt

gtsave(table3_gt, filename = file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "s_table_long_main.docx"))
```
